name: hireminds
description: **HireMinds** is a production-grade, AI-powered career companion platform designed specifically for the Indian job market. It leverages Google's Gemini AI to provide actionable resume feedback, level-aware ATS scoring, and keyword suggestions for candidates at various career stages.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
